title: Careers
lead: LetterLab is currently a small, focused project. Roles listed below describe future needs and the kind of work that may exist as the product grows.

seo.title: Careers | LetterLab
seo.description: Future roles and how to join.

items.title: Clarity
items.body: We value clear communication in product and in how we work.

items.title: Ownership
items.body: Small teams mean everyone owns outcomes. We ship and iterate.

items.title: Inclusion
items.body: We aim for a respectful, inclusive environment where different perspectives help us build better tools.

items.title: Sustainability
items.body: We care about sustainable pace and long-term quality over short-term hype.

items.title: Frontend engineer
items.description: Build and maintain the LetterLab web app: composer, dashboard, and integrations.
success: Comfort with APIs and state management

items.title: Backend engineer
items.description: Own APIs, data pipelines, and reliability for the LetterLab service.

items.title: Product designer
items.description: Shape the product experience from concept to shipped UI.

items.title: Technical writer
items.description: Document product behavior, APIs, and help content.
